task_objective: Fix QAM cache out-of-sync issues where manually adding a game or updating backups via Ludusavi GUI/CLI is not immediately detected by the plugin, by expanding get_config_mtime_ns to monitor all Ludusavi state-carrying files and backup directory files.
design_decisions: Expanded config mtime to a composite SHA-256 hash containing mtimes of config.yaml, cache.yaml, manifest.yaml, the backup directory itself, and all individual game backup subdirectories and mapping.yaml files.
Wrote a custom line-by-line helper _parse_backup_path to parse backup.path from config.yaml without requiring heavy external YAML parsing dependencies.

Handled optional/absent files (such as cache.yaml or the backups directory) gracefully by catching and suppressing OSErrors, while preserving strict exception propagation for the main config.yaml file.
results: Expanded cache marker detects changes to custom games, updated manifests, and new or modified game backups instantly (<1ms overhead, zero subprocesses).
All 369 tests in the test suite pass successfully, and Ruff checks and Ty checks pass.
